ItacPersonItem.Notes: Portrait from Luca Antonio Porzio, Fragmenta Varia (Naples, 1701). For a study of Luca Antonio Porzio`s work see Alessandro Dini, Filosofia della natura, medicina, religione, Franco Angeli, Milan, 1985 (BL Shelfmark: X.629/26986). In 1697 he published his Discourses on `breathing`, which had been previously delivered in the Accademia Sarottiana.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
